metadata.name: Commander Dies — SBA emits choice, owner returns to command zone (CC #28 / MR-M9-01 fix)
metadata.description: Corner case #28 scenario: p1's commander is destroyed. The SBA (CR 903.9a) emits CommanderZoneReturnChoiceRequired. The owner (p1) responds with ReturnCommanderToCommandZone. Commander ends up in command zone. This exercises the fix for MR-M9-01: the choice mechanism now correctly requires the owner to opt-in rather than auto-returning.
metadata.generation_notes: Updated for MR-M9-01 fix. The SBA no longer auto-returns; it emits a choice event. The script adds return_commander_to_command_zone after the SBA check. Negative-evidence assertion remains valid after the choice resolves.

script.step_note: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p1's commander. SBA fires: commander goes to graveyard, then SBA emits choice. p1 returns commander to command zone.

actions.description: Initial: Llanowar Elves (p1 commander) on battlefield, Lightning Bolt in p2 hand
actions.note: CR 903.9a: Commander in graveyard or exile -> owner may return to command zone as SBA.
CR 601.2: p2 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p1's commander (Llanowar Elves, 1/1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to Llanowar Elves (1/1 commander). 3 >= 1 toughness — lethal.

actions.note: Lightning Bolt resolves; commander takes lethal damage.

results.description: Llanowar Elves has damage 3 >= toughness 1. Moves to graveyard. Commander zone-return SBA (903.9a) emits CommanderZoneReturnChoiceRequired.

actions.note: CR 903.9a: Commander in graveyard — owner chooses whether to return to command zone.
CR 903.9a: p1 chooses to return commander to command zone.

actions.description: After SBA + choice: commander NOT in graveyard, NOT on battlefield (in command zone via 903.9a)
actions.note: CR 903.9a: Commander returned to command zone by owner's choice. NOT in graveyard (negative evidence; harness has no zones.command_zone assertion path).
